title: Senior Revenue Manager at Marriott India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Marriott India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marriott India! We are hiring a Revenue Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marriott India:
Marriott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marriott India!
